description_long: This is a low-top, platform-style sneaker with a clean, minimalist design. The upper appears to be made of white canvas material, featuring five eyelets for laces and subtle stitched paneling along the sides. The sole is thick and made of white rubber, with a horizontal line detail running around its circumference and a textured toe cap for added durability. The interior is lightly padded and finished in a light beige color, providing comfort for the wearer. The shoe lacks any visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing a simple and versatile aesthetic. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A white, platform-style canvas sneaker with a thick rubber sole and minimalist design, featuring five eyelets and subtle stitched details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, canvas upper, stitched paneling, and thick rubber sole with a horizontal line detail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, textured rubber toe cap, and symmetrical lacing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the clean side profile and sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel seam, padded collar, and the open interior of the shoe.
